text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide and I have just finished our
training session for the day.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Where's my bottle? Did I leave it on the
track?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Trainer. I need to get my bottle. I'll head
straight home afterward.
choice_data_list: It's dark already, so I'll go with you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Really? Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'm pretty sure it was around there...

text_block_list.name: Assertive Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Did you not hear us the first time? We have a
race coming up soon so get out of our way and
scram.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Excuse you? I'm in your way? That's strange because I'm pretty sure I was here first.

text_block_list.name: Sharp-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
What does that matter to us? Seriously, get lost
already!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, now you're asking for it!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Looks like it... I'm going to see what's wrong.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I was under the impression that there were no
restrictions on the use of this track today.

text_block_list.name: Assertive Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Great, another nosy meddler. What do you want?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hayahide?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm trying to understand if special permission is
required to use this track today for some reason.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If so, please let me know who I need to speak to
in order to get permission. I can go to them on
Taishin's behalf.

text_block_list.name: Assertive Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Well, uh... It's not exactly...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Apologies, I couldn't quite hear you. It's not exactly what? Are you saying that special permission is not required to use this track?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
In that case, would you care to explain why you
told Taishin to leave? Did she commit some sort
of infraction, perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If she interfered with your training in any way,
please let me know.

text_block_list.name: Assertive Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Uh... Um...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What's the matter? Can it be that you had no
legitimate reason to harass Taishin and simply
wanted to throw your weight around?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: If that's the case, then I believe it's you who is in the wrong.

text_block_list.name: Assertive Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ngh! Okay, we get it already!

text_block_list.name: Sharp-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: This is so stupid! Let's just get out of here!

The two are no match for Biwa Hayahide's cold,
hard logic and run off without another word.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, the audacity! Acting like they're the
only ones allowed on the track...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Sorry. You didn't need to do that for me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's fine. I don't mind.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Try not to stay out too late, okay? And make sure
to eat something once you get back to the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah, I know.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe, good!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keep you waiting, Trainer.
choice_data_list: That was so awesome of you!

Your logical thinking and reasoning got them
good!

Your logical argument and reasoning got them
good!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keep you waiting, Trainer.
choice_data_list: That was so awesome of you!

Your logical thinking and reasoning got them
good!

Your logical argument and reasoning got them
good!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: R-really? I was just being my usual self, honestly...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I will say one thing, though.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The best way to handle overly emotional
arguments is to strike them down with sound
logic.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Doing so usually trips up the other person so
much, they give up on their own.

Biwa Hayahide is a little prouder of her logical
approach to things than usual today.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I didn't expect it to have come in handy in such a
situation.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I know sometimes I can come off as cold and
inflexible because of my overly logical thinking,
but...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If I can use it to help my friends out, then I think
it's safe to call it a strength. Hehe.

After successfully defending a friend, Biwa
Hayahide seems to feel even more confident in
her reasoning abilities.
